title: Finish pod backend
body:
Finish backend work for pods. Implement basic pod operations in both in-memory and SQL states. Implement runtime's RemovePod.

Also yanks ReadOnly out of the database as that's in the spec already

Still needs: More unit tests, unified pod/container name and ID registries to ensure that pods and containers cannot share names and/or IDs

comments.body: Actual state and backend code should be complete now. Just needs more unit tests for the new state functions.
:umbrella: The latest upstream changes (presumably 095aaaa) made this pull request unmergeable. Please resolve the merge conflicts.
This should be ready now. Has an ugly hack to make sqlite work right. If we end up not migrating away from SQLite to bolt we should look into fixing that upstream.

This is green and has LGTMs. I'm going to merge to clear the way for the boltdb PR.

@rh-atomic-bot r=rhatdan
